revision.comment: Bot: mark 1 deleted QID(s) as DELETED_QID in ill templates [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24221752933|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:12 nguإڈk 11 hأ´ج¤ (nأ¹ng-lؤ­k)]][[ja:12وœˆ11و—¥ (و—§وڑ¦)]][[ko:ى‌Œë ¥ 12ى›” 11ى‌¼]][[zh-min-nan:12 goeجچh 11 jiجچt (kإ«-leجچk)]][[zh-yue:هچپن؛Œوœˆهچپن¸€]][[zh:هچپن؛Œوœˆهچپن¸€]]
{{Not to be confused with|December 11|qq=December 11}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=هچپن؛Œوœˆهچپن¸€|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=ى‌Œë ¥ 12ى›” 11ى‌¼|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar December|qq=}} '''December 11''' is the 11th day of the month {{ill|Layue|en|Layue|qid=Q905470|lt=December (Shiwasu)|1=Layue}}, the 12th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|و—§وڑ¦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyإچ|ja|ه…­و›œ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyإچ|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|ن»ڈو»…|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10886789}}. == Events == * {{ill|Jianwu|en|Jianwu|qid=Q11065423|lt=Kenmu|1=Jianwu}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1336|en|1336|qid=Q6028|lt=1336|1=1336}} {{ill|January 24|en|January 24|qid=Q2278|lt=January 24|1=January 24}}) â€“ {{ill|Hakoneâ€“Takenoshita Battle|ja|ç®±و ¹مƒ»ç«¹مƒژن¸‹مپ®وˆ¦مپ„|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakoneâ€“Takenoshita Battle|1=Battle of Hakone-Takenoshita|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11603356}}. {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|en|Ashikaga Takauji|qid=Q297107|lt=Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji}}, who raised a rebellion against the Kenmu Shintإچ government, defeated {{ill|Nitta Yoshisada|en|Nitta Yoshisada|qid=Q1328796|lt=Nitta Yoshisada|1=Nitta Yoshisada}}â€™s forces. This event marked the beginning of the turmoil of the {{ill|Northern and Southern Courts period (disambiguation)|en|Northern and Southern Courts period (disambiguation)|qid=Q8140349|lt=Nanboku-chإچ period|1=Northern and Southern Courts period (disambiguation)}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1625|en|1625|qid=Q6826|lt=1625|1=1625}} {{ill|January 19|en|January 19|qid=Q2266|lt=January 19|1=January 19}}) â€“ {{ill|Kitamura Kikin|ja|هŒ—و‌‘ه­£هگں|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitamura Kikin|1=Kitamura Kigin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1743840}}, a {{ill|Waka poet|ja|و­Œن؛؛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Waka poet|qq=}} and {{ill|Haiku poet|ja|ن؟³هڈ¥è©©ن؛؛|1=Q135490197|2=ja|3=ن؟³هڈ¥è©©ن؛؛|qid=DELETED_QID|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (died {{ill|1705|en|1705|qid=Q6830|lt=1705|1=1705}}). * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1627|en|1627|qid=Q6833|lt=1627|1=1627}} {{ill|January 28|en|January 28|qid=Q2285|lt=January 28|1=January 28}}) â€“ {{ill|Tokugawa Mitsusada|en|Tokugawa Mitsusada|qid=Q1046230|lt=Tokugawa Mitsusada|1=Tokugawa Mitsusada}}, the 2nd head of the {{ill|Kii Domain|ja|ç´€ن¼ٹè—©|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kii Domain|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ç´€ه·‍è—©|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ç´€ه·‍è—©|1=Kishإ« Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1069187}} and father of {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshimune|en|Tokugawa Yoshimune|qid=Q319664|lt=Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune}} (died {{ill|1705|en|1705|qid=Q6830|lt=1705|1=1705}}). * {{ill|Tenpإچ|en|Tenpإچ|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpإچ|1=Tenpإچ}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1835|en|1835|qid=Q7597|lt=1835|1=1835}} {{ill|January 9|en|January 9|qid=Q2238|lt=January 9|1=January 9}}) â€“ {{ill|Iwasaki Yatarإچ|en|Iwasaki Yatarإچ|qid=Q380105|lt=Iwasaki Yatarإچ|1=Iwasaki Yatarإچ}}, a businessperson and founder of the {{ill|Mitsubishi zaibatsu|ja|ن¸‰èڈ±è²،é–¥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsubishi zaibatsu|1=Mitsubishi zaibatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10866745}} (died {{ill|1885|en|1885|qid=Q7821|lt=1885|1=1885}}). <ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Iwasaki-Yataro Iwasaki Yatarإچ, Encyclopأ¦dia Britannica]</ref> * {{ill|Bunkyإ«|en|Bunkyإ«|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyإ«|1=Bunkyإ«}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1864|en|1864|qid=Q7704|lt=1864|1=1864}} {{ill|January 19|en|January 19|qid=Q2266|lt=January 19|1=January 19}}) â€“ {{ill|Sakunosuke Koyama|en|Sakunosuke Koyama|qid=Q11459801|lt=Koyama Sakunosuke|1=Sakunosuke Koyama}}, a composer and educator (died {{ill|1927|en|1927|qid=Q18110|lt=1927|1=1927}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Shإچhإچ|en|Shإچhإچ|qid=Q1146192|lt=Shإچhإچ|1=Shإچhإچ}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1646|en|1646|qid=Q6930|lt=1646|1=1646}} {{ill|January 27|en|January 27|qid=Q2284|lt=January 27|1=January 27}}) â€“ {{ill|Takuan Sإچhإچ|en|Takuan Sإچhإچ|qid=Q632866|lt=Sawakan Sإچhإچ|1=Takuan Sإچhإچ}}, a monk of the {{ill|Rinzai school|en|Rinzai school|qid=Q639625|lt=Rinzai school|1=Rinzai school}} (born {{ill|1573|en|1573|qid=Q6678|lt=1573|1=1573}}). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|12|10|12|12|11|11|1|12|1211|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
